ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parking_spots" (
  "spot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parking spot */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title or name of the parking spot */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the building associated with the parking spot */,
  "campus" TEXT /* Campus designation where the parking spot is located */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of parking (e.g., car, bicycle) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the parking spot */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the parking spot */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the parking spot */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the parking spot */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Number of spots available in the parking facility */,
  "occupancy_status" TEXT /* Current occupancy status (e.g., 'open', 'full') */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the occupancy status */,
  "accessibility" TEXT /* Information about accessibility features (e.g., wheelchair access) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parking_spots_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building */,
  "campus" TEXT /* Campus designation for the building */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the building */,
  "building_type" TEXT /* Type of building (e.g., academic, residential) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Number of people the building can accommodate */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the building */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the building */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parking_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of parking */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the parking type (e.g., car, bicycle) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parking type */,
  "icon" TEXT /* URL to an icon representing the parking type (for map visualization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing record */,
  "spot_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parking spot that this pricing applies to */,
  "fee_structure" TEXT /* Detailed fee structure for the parking spot */,
  "max_fee" REAL /* Maximum fee applicable for the parking */,
  "valid_hours" TEXT /* Operational hours for the parking spot */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the fees are denominated */,
  "discounts" TEXT /* JSON object containing discounts for different user roles or times */,
  "payment_methods" TEXT /* JSON object containing supported payment methods (e.g., credit card, mobile pay) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_spot_id FOREIGN KEY ("spot_id") REFERENCES parking_spots ("spot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, faculty, staff) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for contact */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* User's license plate number for easy identification */,
  "account_balance" REAL /* User's account balance for prepaid parking */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the reservation */,
  "spot_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parking spot being reserved */,
  "reservation_date" TEXT /* Date of the reservation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the reservation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the reservation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., 'confirmed', 'canceled') */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., 'pending', 'paid') */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used for payment (e.g., 'credit card', 'mobile pay') */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for cancellation, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_spot_id FOREIGN KEY ("spot_id") REFERENCES parking_spots ("spot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., 'login', 'reservation') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
